# AI Infra Handbook

> 面向后端、平台和 AI 应用开发者的 AI Infra 工程学习手册。项目定位是学习项目，不是生产平台。

Website: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/
Repository: https://github.com/wdkang123/ai-infra-handbook
Language: zh-CN with short English repository summary.

## Core Entry Points

- Home: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/
- 15-minute Quickstart: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/quickstart/15-minute-demo
- Learning Route: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/00-overview/02-learning-route
- AI Infra Intro: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/landing/ai-infra-intro
- AI Gateway: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/landing/ai-gateway
- LLM Observability: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/landing/llm-observability
- LLM Evaluation: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/landing/llm-evaluation
- Production Migration: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/landing/production-migration

## Runnable Learning Projects

- inference-service: OpenAI-compatible learning service with health, models, chat completions, streaming, metrics, events, and request timelines.
- ai-gateway: Learning gateway with auth, routing, rate limit, fallback, cache, upstream health, metrics, events, and failure summaries.
- eval-module: Evaluation CLI with run, compare, leaderboard, sample analysis, history, and release recommendation.
- finetune-demo: Training asset scaffold with dataset registry, run manifest, checkpoint index, export manifest, history, and lineage.

## Important Artifacts

- request id
- events timeline
- Prometheus-style metrics
- eval report
- release recommendation
- run manifest
- export manifest
- evidence packet

## Public Growth Pages

- Community Path: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/community/00-overview
- First PR Playbook: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/community/01-first-pr-playbook
- Safe Data and Evidence: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/community/02-safe-data-and-evidence
- Maintainer Triage Rhythm: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/community/03-triage-and-maintainer-rhythm
- Starter Issues: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/08-publication/15-starter-issues
- v0.1.0 Release Notes: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/08-publication/16-v0-1-release-notes
- Failure Case Playbook: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/11-case-studies/06-failure-case-playbook

## Production Migration Anchors

- vLLM Adapter Design: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/12-production-migration/05-vllm-adapter-design
- OpenTelemetry GenAI Tracing Design: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/12-production-migration/06-opentelemetry-genai-tracing
- Prometheus Metrics Map: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/12-production-migration/07-prometheus-metrics-map
- SGLang Migration Notes: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/12-production-migration/08-sglang-migration-notes
- Eval Regression Gate Example: https://wdkang123.github.io/ai-infra-handbook/04-evaluation-observability/09-eval-regression-gate-example

## Boundaries

Do not describe this repository as a production AI platform. It is a public learning handbook and runnable scaffold. It should not be used with real secrets, private user data, production logs, model weights, or unredacted local machine paths.
